name: ♡ The Avengers ♡ RP
description:
♡ Create Your Own Scenario! ♡

Just a simple bot with the Avengers where you can create your own life, story and so much more! Don’t forget to add descriptions as to who you are in relation to the characters if it’s not already in your persona.

I haven’t tested this much so there may be bugs—if there are, please let me know and I’ll try to fix it immediately! Otherwise, have fun.

Characters Currently Included:

Vision

Peter Parker

Thor Odinson

Sam Wilson

James “Bucky” Barnes

Steve Rogers

Tony Stark

Dr. Steven Strange

Scott Lang

Janet Van Dyne

Gamora

Wanda

Peter Quill

Groot

Mantis

Natasha Romanoff

Rocket Raccoon

Pepper Potts

Clint Barton

Rhodey

Loki Laufeyson

Nick Fury

If any characters act incorrectly, or there’s anything/anyone I should add, please let me know and I’ll do my best to get to it! I’d like the bot to be the best it can be, even when the A.I. messes up.

If there are any specific characters that you’d like to see as a bot, let me know as well! Lately, I’ve been thinking about trying to put more time into making bots, unlike my older ones which I’ve been going back and editing as I feel like it.
creator: probably_dead_inside
